posts.cookedHtml:
Here is the link

mondayproapps.com

monday apps and automation

Monday apps and automation

How it’s works

I created this to solve my own problem and seeing it works so well I thought to share with Monday community.

If you have any feedback just tag me here or email me. Would love to improve this.

currently it support only automation that comes with Monday by default. I wanna add Apps automation as well but don’t know which one to start from, so if you have that in mind share them with me here

posts.author: AnishJ (Anish)
posts.cookedHtml:
Exactly for this reason I made this site, it’s hard to find automation and I’ve read so many people just ask for the automation and most of the time some app solves that issue

image940×997 138 KB

I added few more apps so now searching for them is now working as well.
